---
output: 
  pdf_document: 
    keep_tex: yes
---

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(stargazer)

df <- read.csv("base_MULT_did.csv")

```

```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}

df <- df %>% mutate(Tt = ifelse(ano >= 2012, 1, 0))

```

```{r}
Reg_did <- lm(y ~ d * Tt, data = df)
```



```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}

# # Load libraries
# library("lmtest")
# library("sandwich")
# 
# # Robust t test
# coeftest(Reg_did, vcov = vcovHC(Reg_did, type = "HC0"))
# Load libraries
library("lmtest")
library("sandwich")

# Robust t test
cov1 <- sandwich::vcovHC(Reg_did, type = "HC0")
sd = sqrt(diag(cov1))
stargazer(Reg_did, type = "latex", se = list(sd),
          title = "Regressão Linear com Erros Padrão Robustos")

```
